note: v376: 'How to pay' is now structured payment methods instead of a free-text box. Settings → Invoice Defaults lists Zelle/Venmo/Cash App/PayPal/Cash/Check, each a brand-tiled row with a handle field + on/off toggle, plus an optional payment note. Invoices print enabled methods as brand-tiled rows. New profiles.pay_methods jsonb column; legacy pay_instructions still prints as the note / old-style fallback.
